LOCATION

Located in the heart of Basel's industrial district, KINKER is easily accessible by public transport and offers nearby parking options.

Address

KINKER BASEL

Klybeckstrasse 99

4057 Basel

Switzerland

Open in Google Maps

Opening Hours

Tuesday23:00 - 06:00
Friday23:00 - 08:00
Saturday23:00 - 08:00

How to Get There

Public Transport

Take tram line 8 or 14 to "Klybeck" station. The club is a 3-minute walk from there. Night buses operate on weekends.

Bus

Bus lines 30, 31, and 36 stop at "Klybeckstrasse". From Basel SBB, take bus 30 direction "Habermatten".

By Car

From the A3 highway, take exit "Basel-Kleinhüningen". Limited street parking available. We recommend using public transport.

Getting Home Safely

Basel has an excellent night bus network (SN1-SN5) that operates after midnight on weekends. The nearest night bus stop is at Klybeckplatz, just 5 minutes walk from the club. Taxis are available at the venue entrance.

We encourage everyone to plan their journey home in advance and look out for each other. Your safety is our priority.

KINKER.

Hard techno in Basel. No racism. No hate. Just music.
